name: Unacademy
description: Online learning platform for UPSC, JEE, NEET, and competitive exam preparation with live classes and India's top educators
pros: Top educators for UPSC, JEE, NEET preparation
Free content available on YouTube and app
Subscription model (Plus) with structured learning paths
cons: Foreign investors (SoftBank, General Atlantic) hold 60-65% equity
Founders stepped down from operations in May 2025
Course quality varies widely depending on the educator
userComplaints: Refund policy is extremely strict — difficult to get money back
Some educators left for competing platforms, taking content with them
App pushes too many notifications and upsells to Plus subscription
